annotations.comment: New module-local versioning policy: APF version is independent from parent Ordo language package version.
Adopts graph generator v1.1 annotation overlay as optional review aid; focused context SVG remains default.
Source YAML readiness should include explicit module versioning confirmation.
State captures module id, module version, language compatibility, and inclusion model.
Preview annotation layer is not a source of truth; it only improves SVG review.
